source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Inter Variable or Geist for compact English product UI, Geist Mono for telemetry and tabular sensor values, and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese navigation, command labels, status text, and water-quality dashboards.
layout: Compact 8px dashboard grids, shell-panel navigation, waterline dividers, low-profile command surfaces, telemetry tables, pond-glass forms, 8px maximum radii, bronze focus rings, and fine wet-shell stipple textures.

prompts.label: Transparent diving beetle motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation on a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompts.prompt: Use case: photorealistic-natural. Asset type: Morphous Diving Beetle transparent motif chroma-key source. Primary request: Create only an isolated diving beetle motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text. Subject: A single predaceous diving beetle with accurate aquatic beetle anatomy: smooth oval hydrodynamic body, olive-black glossy carapace, subtle bronze rim highlights, dark segmented head and thorax, short antennae, paddle-like rear legs with fine swimming hairs, amber-brown leg joints, wet shell specular highlights, freshwater pond adaptation, refined submerged control-system mood. Show the full beetle from a slightly elevated three-quarter top view so the shell shape, head, legs, and paddle hind legs are all visible. Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop any legs, antennae, or body edges. Keep the subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges. Lighting/mood: clean studio lighting that preserves natural olive-black shell color, teal-tinted wet highlights, and tactile insect detail. Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject. Constraints: no pond scene, no water splash, no plants, no rocks, no second insect, no larvae, no text, no watermark, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Diving Beetle light-mode design-system board. Input image role: The visible transparent diving beetle motif is the source reference for palette, texture, contrast, shape language, and interaction mood. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Diving Beetle", derived from the visible transparent diving beetle cutout. Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board. Required visible sections: Morphous Diving Beetle, Diving Beetle, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows. Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from olive-black glossy shell, bronze shell rim, amber paddle legs, teal water reflections, pale pond-glass highlights, deep pond shadow, and fine swimming-hair texture. It should feel like a submerged control system for monitoring, fleet control, telemetry, sensor data, and operational workflows. UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, telemetry charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, and simple product icons. Typography: include clear English UI type guidance plus Japanese typography guidance using labels such as Japanese Typography, Noto Sans JP, 監視, 潜航, 水質, 設定. Use large readable labels and avoid tiny paragraphs. Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, compact dashboard density, 8px max radius, glossy beetle-shell panels, waterline dividers, bronze rim focus states, teal sensor accents, pond-glass surfaces, and fine stippled shell texture. Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals; no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-dominant theme. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Diving Beetle" or "Diving Beetle", no long unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Diving Beetle dark-mode design-system board. Input image roles: The visible transparent diving beetle motif is the source motif reference, and the visible light-mode board is the layout and component-language reference. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Diving Beetle". It must feel like the same visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible diving beetle cutout. Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board. Required visible sections: Morphous Diving Beetle, Diving Beetle, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows. Visual details: dark background derived from deep pond shadow and olive-black beetle shell; foreground from pale pond-glass highlights; primary actions from water teal; accent and focus states from bronze shell rim and amber paddle legs; secondary states from olive moss; surfaces from charcoal-black shell panels; borders from muted pond glass; subtle wet-shell speckle, waterline dividers, and submerged telemetry texture overlays. UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard/data charts, forms, tables, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, and shadows. Typography: include clear English UI type guidance and Japanese typography guidance using labels such as Japanese Typography, Noto Sans JP, 監視, 潜航, 水質, 設定. Use large readable labels and avoid tiny paragraphs. Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style submerged control system, precise grid, compact dashboard density, 8px max radius, glossy beetle-shell cards, dark pond telemetry panels, teal sensor accents, bronze focus rings, and calm command-console hierarchy. Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals; no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Diving Beetle" or "Diving Beetle", no long unreadable paragraphs.
